title: The Long Night: When Winter First Came #got #shorts
description: Before the kingdoms, before the throne, there was a winter that nearly ended the world. The Long Night was not just a season—it was a war against darkness itself. This is how it began. #LongNight #WhiteWalkers #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: Long before kings and kingdoms, there came a winter that did not end—and the world nearly died in darkness.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient frozen landscape under endless night sky, eerie and vast, dark fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This was the Long Night, a time when the sun vanished and cold consumed everything.
scenes.image_prompt: sun fading behind black clouds as snow spreads across the land, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Crops failed, fires dimmed, and entire civilizations began to collapse under the weight of endless winter.
scenes.image_prompt: frozen villages with starving people and dying fires, bleak atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But the cold was not the only threat—something moved within the darkness, watching and waiting.
scenes.image_prompt: shadowy figures with glowing blue eyes in the distance, barely visible, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Others emerged, beings of ice and silence, bringing death with every step they took.
scenes.image_prompt: White Walkers appearing through snowstorm, elegant and terrifying, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Where they walked, the dead rose again, turning the fallen into an army that could not be stopped.
scenes.image_prompt: wights rising from snow, lifeless eyes glowing, horror tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Humanity faced an enemy it could not understand, one that did not tire, fear, or negotiate.
scenes.image_prompt: humans retreating before advancing icy army, overwhelming threat, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As the darkness spread, hope began to fade, and the world stood on the edge of extinction.
scenes.image_prompt: map of ancient world being consumed by darkness and ice, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Legends say a hero rose during this time, bringing light against the endless night.
scenes.image_prompt: silhouette of a warrior holding a glowing sword in the darkness, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because the Long Night was not just a disaster—it was a war between life and something far older than death.
scenes.image_prompt: massive clash between fire-lit warriors and icy shadows, epic final frame, vertical 1080x1920
